offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual calculations cause delays in tax reporting. We automate the generation of monthly tax withholding summaries instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem: Manual generation of tax withholding summaries is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms seeking solutions
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for data entry and report export
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
